items.line_en: Hello, everyone. My name is Sophia.

coach.say: Hello, everyone. My name is Sophia.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hello, / everyone. / My name is Sophia.

items.line_en: Today I will tell you about my morning routine.

coach.say: Today I will tell you about my morning routine.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Today I will tell you about my morning routine.

items.line_en: I will speak slowly and clearly.

coach.say: I will speak slowly and clearly.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I will speak slowly and / clearly.

items.line_en: This lesson is perfect for beginners and A2 learners.

coach.say: This lesson is perfect for beginners and A2 learners.
coach.hint: Chunk it: This lesson is perfect for beginners and / A2 learners.

items.line_en: Are you ready? Let's start.

coach.say: Are you ready? Let's start.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Are you ready? / Let's start.

items.line_en: I usually wake up at 7 o'clock.

coach.say: I usually wake up at 7 o'clock.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I usually wake up at 7 o'clock.

items.line_en: My alarm rings and I get up.

coach.say: My alarm rings and I get up.
coach.hint: Chunk it: My alarm rings and / I get up.

items.line_en: I stretch my arms and smile.

coach.say: I stretch my arms and smile.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I stretch my arms and / smile.

items.line_en: Then I go to the bathroom.

coach.say: Then I go to the bathroom.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Then I go to the bathroom.

items.line_en: I brush my teeth.

coach.say: I brush my teeth.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I brush my teeth.

items.line_en: I wash my face with cold water.

coach.say: I wash my face with cold water.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I wash my face with cold water.

items.line_en: It helps me wake up.

coach.say: It helps me wake up.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It helps me wake up.

items.line_en: After that, I go to the kitchen.

coach.say: After that, I go to the kitchen.
coach.hint: Chunk it: After that, / I go to the kitchen.

items.line_en: I make my breakfast.

coach.say: I make my breakfast.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I make my breakfast.

items.line_en: I usually eat bread and eggs.

coach.say: I usually eat bread and eggs.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I usually eat bread and / eggs.

items.line_en: Sometimes I eat fruit.

coach.say: Sometimes I eat fruit.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Sometimes I eat fruit.

items.line_en: I drink a hot cup of tea.

coach.say: I drink a hot cup of tea.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I drink a hot cup of tea.

items.line_en: It makes me feel ready for the day.

coach.say: It makes me feel ready for the day.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It makes me feel ready for the day.

items.line_en: Then I choose my clothes.

coach.say: Then I choose my clothes.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Then I choose my clothes.

items.line_en: I wear jeans and a simple shirt.

coach.say: I wear jeans and a simple shirt.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I wear jeans and / a simple shirt.

items.line_en: If it is cold, I wear a sweater too.

coach.say: If it is cold, I wear a sweater too.
coach.hint: Chunk it: If it is cold, / I wear a sweater too.

items.line_en: I brush my hair.

coach.say: I brush my hair.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I brush my hair.

items.line_en: I check my bag.

coach.say: I check my bag.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I check my bag.

items.line_en: I take my phone, keys, and wallet.

coach.say: I take my phone, keys, and wallet.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I take my phone, / keys, / and wallet.

items.line_en: Finally, I put on my shoes.

coach.say: Finally, I put on my shoes.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Finally, / I put on my shoes.

items.line_en: I leave the house.

coach.say: I leave the house.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I leave the house.

items.line_en: I walk to the bus stop.

coach.say: I walk to the bus stop.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I walk to the bus stop.

items.line_en: I see other people going to work.

coach.say: I see other people going to work.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I see other people going to work.

items.line_en: The morning is fresh and busy.

coach.say: The morning is fresh and busy.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The morning is fresh and / busy.

items.line_en: This is my morning routine.

coach.say: This is my morning routine.
coach.hint: Chunk it: This is my morning routine.

items.line_en: What about you?

coach.say: What about you?
coach.hint: Chunk it: What about you?

items.line_en: What do you do in some morning?

coach.say: What do you do in some morning?
coach.hint: Chunk it: What do you do in some morning?

items.line_en: Thank you for watching.

coach.say: Thank you for watching.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thank you for watching.

items.line_en: Don't forget to like, share, and subscribe for more easy English lessons.

coach.say: Don't forget to like, share, and subscribe for more easy English lessons.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Don't forget to like, / share, / and subscribe for more easy English lessons.
